name: Cheese Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Onion, pepper, & mushrooms (mixture of 3 vegetables)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lasagna noodles in boiling water until tender.
2. Drain and set aside.
3. In a separate bowl, combine tomato sauce and chopped onions, peppers, and mushrooms.
4. Mix in the cottage cheese, eggs, and parmesan cheese.
5. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
6. In an 8-inch x 8-inch casserole dish, layer half the noodles, the cottage cheese mixture, and grated mozzarella cheese.
7. Top with tomato sauce mix and the rest of the noodles.
8. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
9. Bake for 25 minutes.
Food Exchange per serving: 4 MEATS EXCHANGES + 2 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGES + 1 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 500, PRO: 36gm; FAT: 10gm; CAR: 52gm;
Source: Vegetarian Cooking for Diabetics by Patricia Mozzer Brought to you and yours via Nancy O'Brion and her Meal-Master
